archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) crossed with Dark Web3/AI Tech
vibe: Premium, developer-focused, authoritative, futuristic, Stripe/Linear/Vercel aesthetic.

grid_system.bento_cards: 1px border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-xl rounded-2xl overflow-hidden

animations.hero: Maximalist Framer Motion entry, animated React Flow DNA graph, glowing background gradient spheres.
animations.scroll_reveals: Staggered text reveals, opacity and subtle y-axis translation.
animations.micro_interactions: Magnetic buttons, 'Tracing Beam' glowing border effect on hover for feature cards.

sections.name: Header
sections.style: Sticky, glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl), border-b border-white/10. Logo, Nav Links, Primary CTA ('Launch App').
sections.instructions: Ensure z-50 and proper padding-top on the body to avoid overlap.

sections.name: Hero
sections.style: Dark void background with deep glowing cyan/purple orbs. Large H1 text + sub-headline. Dual CTAs (Launch App, Watch 90-sec Demo). Visual: React Flow integrated representing the 'Innovation DNA' (Innovation->Contributions->Funding->Milestones->Rewards).
sections.components: framer-motion for text, reactflow / @xyflow/react for the animated graph.

sections.name: Tech Stack / Logos Row
sections.style: react-fast-marquee. Very slow smooth drift. High contrast tech logos representing the stack (React, TS, Tailwind, Gemini, Solidity, Base, Prisma, Postgres, IPFS).

sections.name: Problem (The Innovation Black Hole)
sections.style: Aggressive typography. Red/Orange subtle glow to represent the 'black hole' where $2.7T R&D vanishes.

sections.name: Solution (Meet OICE)
sections.style: 4 Pillars: Gemini AI, Ethereum Escrow, Innovation Passports, DNA Graphs. Presented in a 2x2 grid or overlapping bento.

sections.name: How It Works (Timeline)
sections.style: 8-step vertical timeline with animated connecting line (framer motion draw path on scroll). Steps: Create -> Contribute -> AI Evaluates -> Validate -> Fund -> Hit Milestones -> Distribute Rewards -> Generate Passport.

sections.name: Feature Deep-Dives
sections.style: Uneven bento grid. Highlight the AI Contribution Evaluator (5 dimensions), Escrow & Rewards, DNA Graph visualization, and Innovation Passport. Use mock UI components (Shadcn Tabs, Charts, Badges) as 'proof-by-screenshot'.

sections.name: Why Now
sections.style: Three converging forces. Clean 3-column layout with glowing icons (lucide-react).

sections.name: Simulation Engine & Final CTA
sections.style: Immersive full-width section. Dark overlay. Glowing 'Run Simulation' magnetic button. Stats counters animating (5 AI dimensions, 5 smart contract fns, 12 lifecycle steps).

sections.name: Footer
sections.style: Comprehensive multi-column footer. Huge 'OICE' text backdrop. Subtle grey links.

hero_abstract_bg.description: Abstract blue glowing dots forming wave patterns - use for background ambience.

feature_code_snippet.description: Code on screen - use inside the 'AI Evaluator' or 'Smart Contract' bento cards as a visual.

feature_network_map.description: Close up map of world / network - use for 'Innovation Passport' or 'Simulation Engine' bento cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React (.jsx/.js files), Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and Shadcn UI.
Do NOT use TypeScript (.tsx). Use standard JavaScript (.jsx) for React components.
Use pure HTML and Tailwind for complex marketing layouts; use Shadcn for interactive components (Tabs, Accordions, Dialogs).
For the Tech Stack / Integration logos, install 'react-icons' and use 'react-icons/si' (Simple Icons) such as SiReact, SiTailwindcss, SiEthereum, SiPostgresql.
Install and use 'reactflow' or '@xyflow/react' for the animated DNA graph in the Hero section. Make nodes dark with glowing cyan/purple borders.
Follow the 'Dark Mode Swiss + Electric Tech' archetype. Default background must be #050505.
Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Do not use generic Inter for headings.
Use 'framer-motion' heavily. Sections should fade/slide in. Buttons should have hover scale/magnetic effects.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='launch-app-button').
Implement routing for 'Launch App' and 'Run Simulation' buttons to a placeholder app dashboard page.
